data.title: NHSA partners with EarlyDay platform for Head Start locations to address staffing issues. - 107 characters
data.description: A recent collaboration with EarlyDay has paved the way for Head Start facilities to utilize a specialized recruiting and hiring platform tailored for the early childhood sector in their efforts to address staffing obstacles. This partnership was announced in San Francisco on January 20, 2026. The National Head Start Association (NHSA), a prominent advocate for early childhood education, has spearheaded this initiative to provide Head Start locations with access to a platform designed to streamline the recruitment and hiring process, ultimately enhancing workforce management.

data.title: Consumer watchdog group received $1.4M+ in state fees in 2025, 96.8% of funds from Prop 103, adding to millions since its inception.
data.description: A contentious organization has received 96.8% of funds from a program it established in Proposition 103. The organization has amassed tens of millions since the program's initiation. Information disclosed by the California Department of Insurance unveils this concerning trend.

data.title: Dr. Timothy Lubenow moved from academia to MAPS Centers for Pain Control in Chicago, bringing advanced relief directly to patients.
data.description: Dr. Timothy R. Lubenow, previously the Chair of Pain Medicine at Rush University, has recently joined MAPS Centers for Pain Control based in Chicago on January 20, 2026. Dr. Lubenow, who originally began his career at Rush as an anesthesiology resident in the 1980s, witnessed the evolution of pain medicine during his tenure there. This move signifies a significant change in the healthcare landscape, with Dr. Lubenow bringing a wealth of experience and knowledge to MAPS Centers for Pain Control.

data.title: Equity LifeStyle Properties, Inc. to release 4th quarter 2025 earnings on Jan. 28 after market close. #ELS #NYSE #earnings.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Equity LifeStyle Properties, Inc. (NYSE: ELS) shared that its fourth quarter 2025 earnings report will be disclosed on January 28, 2026, after the market closes. The Company's financial performance for that quarter will be made public on that date.

data.title: CoreAge Rx expands GLP-1 weight program to support New Year weight loss goals with increased access for clients.
data.description: In Wichita Falls, Texas on January 20, 2026, CoreAge Rx, a prominent telehealth pharmacy known for its personalized medication services, revealed plans for a significant New Year's expansion focused on its compounded GLP-1 weight management program. This strategic move aims to enhance access to this program and cater to a larger clientele.

data.title: Liberty Energy Inc (NYSE: LBRT) declares $0.09 per share dividend, to be paid on March 18, 2026 to holders as of March 4.
data.description: In Denver, Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) revealed that their Board of Directors has confirmed a dividend of $0.09 per share of Class A common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be distributed on March 18, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of March 4, 2026. The Board will need to approve any upcoming quarterly cash dividends, with each declaration dependent on their ongoing evaluation of what is most advantageous for Liberty.

data.title: Ventas Inc (NYSE: VTR) declared 2025 distributions with taxable dividend income at $1.89 per share.
data.description: Ventas, Inc. disclosed the tax treatment for its 2025 distributions on common stock (NYSE: VTR). The total taxable dividend income for the year was $1.89 per share, with the fourth quarter 2024 dividend at $0.45 per share. This dividend was declared on December 10, 2024, and disbursed on January 16, 2025, to shareholders on record as of December 31, 2024. The breakdown of the distributions is detailed in a table provided by the company.

data.title: Puptqe expands nationwide in $157B US pet market with franchise model focused on dogs, community, hospitality.
data.description: A company called Puptqe based in Temecula, California, is making a move to expand nationwide by providing franchise opportunities. The company focuses on creating a dog-centered business model centered around community engagement, hospitality, and unique experiences. The expansion aims to offer franchise partners across the country the chance to be part of this concept.

data.title: BXP reveals 2025 tax treatment of distributions on common stock. Shareholders advised to consult tax advisors.
data.description: In Boston, BXP (NYSE: BXP), the leading developer, owner, and manager of premium workplaces in the US, revealed the 2025 tax implications for distributions on its common stock. Shareholders are advised to seek guidance from their tax advisors regarding the individual tax implications of these distributions. The common shares (CUSIP #101121101) will have a total distribution per share.

data.title: Portland General Electric will release 2025 earnings on Feb 20 via call with key company figures. More on Benzinga.
data.description: Portland General Electric Company (NYSE: POR) based in Portland, Oregon, is set to conduct an analyst conference call and webcast at 11 a.m. ET on Friday, February 20. This event is scheduled to discuss the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full-year 2025. The company will unveil its earnings summary for this period before the opening of the U.S. financial markets on the same day. Leading the conference call will be Maria Pope, President and CEO, alongside Joe Trpik, Senior Vice President of Finance and CFO. More details are accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Serve Robotics to acquire Diligent Robotics, maker of healthcare robot assistants, both powered by Nvidia technology.
data.description: Serve Robotics is set to purchase Diligent Robotics, a company specializing in robot assistants for the healthcare sector. This acquisition marks a significant deal in the industry, with Serve Robotics buying the Nvidia-powered Diligent Robotics. The acquisition is expected to have a notable impact on the market, showcasing the growing importance of robotics in healthcare.

data.title: Construction Partners saw a price performance boost, earning a rating upgrade, but the market declined post-upgrade.
data.description: Construction Partners experienced a notable increase in price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This upgrade occurred on Tuesday. However, shortly after the upgrade, the market experienced a decline.

data.title: Nobilis Group in Irving, TX announces Stan Starnes as President, Jeff Beaver as Chief Administrative Officer, and Rushi Modha as COO.
data.description: In Irving, Texas, Nobilis Group, Inc., a company offering vehicle protection programs, chemical manufacturing solutions, and repair services for automotive, RV, powersports, and marine industries, has promoted Stan Starnes to President and Jeff Beaver to Chief Administrative Officer. They have also welcomed Rushi Modha as the new Chief Operating Officer. The founder, Troy Good, remains at the helm of the company. This move brings experienced individuals into top roles within the organization, reflecting Nobilis's commitment to growth and innovation.
